lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Cobra Mk IV
sources.what: Stock hull stats, hardpoint/internal layout, and module sellers for this ship.

sources.label: Fandom — Cobra Mk IV
sources.what: Manufacturer (Faulcon DeLacy), Horizons-exclusive availability, Mk III comparison, and the ship image used on this page.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Side-by-side comparison of every Cobra variant (Mk III, Mk IV, Mk V), ranking them best to worst.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Opinionated tier list placing the Cobra Mk IV in the bottom rank among several weaker ships.
